content: Mitch: ...and that's another round on the house for everyone! Now get this party started! Fisherman, have you brought the catch of the day, or have you decided to take the night off for once? Fisherman: Just fishing, Mitch. It wouldn't be worth catching anything tonight, considering my luck. But as I've said many times before, the good part about being a Fisherman is that I work under the sea, in privacy. Mitch: Ah, come now, Fisherman! What's a beautiful specimen like you do all alone in the sea at night? Don't tell me you spend it staring at your net the whole time. That seems like a waste. Or maybe you've encountered some strange sea creature willing to give you quite a show? Fisherman: Hmm, maybe I oughta start charging for such thrilling tales, old sport. But for the mean time, let me introduce you to my personal aquatic playmate for tonight.  A sea gurgler, just pulsing with hormones at my touch.

Mitch: Sea gurgler? Oh, I see... How exciting! Well, let's just hope you don't need any help reeling that bad boy in. If things get too intense for you, just holler and I'll come running. Who knows, maybe I'll bring along a little extra motivation for you to speed up the process. Until then, keep that fishing pole wet and happy.
